creator: waldeck@gmx.de
text:
bpfstat output has a column with flags
but the man page does not contain a description of the values:

% bpfstat
  pid   netif  flags recv drop match sblen hblen command
20560  pflog0  p--s-    0    0     0     0     0 pflogd
61749     ed1  -ifs-  653    0     1     0     0 dhclient

Fix: 

add a description
How-To-Repeat: bpftstat
